productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Boys Airfeild Red T-Shirt
description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short fold-over sleeves which are folded at the cuff, black panels on the shoulders, graphic print on the front with embroidery, graphic print on the right sleeve and brand tag above the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This doodle T-shirt is designed to make your little bundle of mischief look like a little pilot. The graphic print is a tribute to his love and awe for aeroplanes and flying, while he stays comfortable all day with the cotton fabric. Pair it with shorts and slip-ons for unbridled comfort.
